title: 「That way」句型
titleZh: 「That way」表達做法帶來的結果或好處
titleEn: Using That way to express the result or benefit of an action

source.file: Sentence Structure 27 -「That way」表達做法帶來的結果或好處.pdf
omissions: The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.
The English wording in rule 5 expands the bilingual glossary labels into complete explanatory sentences without changing their meaning.

formula: Action / advice / method. That way, + complete clause showing the result or benefit.

formulas.formula: Action / advice / method. That way, + complete clause showing the result or benefit.
Sentence 1. That way, + subject + can / will / may / could / would + base verb + other information.

example: You should study this part first. That way, the rest will get easier.
exampleZh: 你應該先讀這一部分。那樣的話，其餘部分就會變得較容易。

examples.en: You should study this part first. That way, the rest will get easier.
examples.zh: 你應該先讀這一部分。那樣的話，其餘部分就會變得較容易。
examples.highlight: That way, the rest will get easier.

meaning.en: Use That way to show what result, convenience or benefit can come from the action, advice or method mentioned immediately before it.
meaning.zh: 使用 That way 說明前一句所提出的行動、建議或做法會帶來甚麼結果、方便或好處。

benefits.en: It makes the action-result relationship clear by showing what action to take first and what result may follow.
benefits.zh: 清楚顯示行動與結果的關係：先說明應採取甚麼行動，再帶出可能出現的結果。

benefits.en: It is useful for giving advice and instructions because you can state the suggestion first and then explain its practical benefit.
benefits.zh: 適合提出建議和指示：先提出建議，再解釋這項建議的實際好處。

benefits.en: It avoids repeating the whole action. That way can refer back naturally instead of repeating if you do this or by doing this.
benefits.zh: 避免重複整個做法；That way 能自然指回上一句的方法，不必反覆寫 if you do this 或 by doing this。

benefits.en: It breaks a long idea into two manageable sentences, making explanations easier to read and say.
benefits.zh: 把較長的想法分成兩句，讓內容更容易閱讀，也更容易在說話時組織。

benefits.en: It gives you a useful speaking frame: state the suggestion, pause briefly, and add the result with That way.
benefits.zh: 為口語回答提供實用框架：先說出建議，稍作停頓，再用 That way 補充結果。

benefits.en: It helps you express certainty accurately. Can, will, may, could and would show whether a result is possible, expected or uncertain.
benefits.zh: 配合 can、will、may、could 和 would，準確表達結果是有能力做到、預期會發生，還是只有可能發生。

rules.en: That way refers back to the action, advice or method in the previous sentence.
rules.zh: That way 指回上一句所述的行動、建議或做法。

rules.en: In this exercise, begin a new sentence with That way and place a comma after it.
rules.zh: 在這份練習中，That way 必須放在新一句的開頭，後面加逗號。
examples: Correct: Save the document now. That way, you will not lose your work.
Incorrect: Save the document now, that way you will not lose your work.

rules.en: A complete clause containing a subject and a verb must follow That way.
rules.zh: That way 後面必須接完整子句，包括主語和動詞。
examples: Correct: That way, you can find the answer quickly.
Incorrect: That way, finding the answer quickly.

rules.en: Keep the original level of certainty: use can / could for ability or opportunity, will / would for an expected result, and may / might for a possible but uncertain result.
rules.zh: 保留原句的肯定程度：表達能力或機會時使用 can / could；表達預期結果時使用 will / would；表達不確定的可能性時使用 may / might。

rules.en: Do not confuse That way with By the way, In that way or That is why. That way introduces a result; By the way changes the topic; In that way describes a method; That is why gives a result after a reason.
rules.zh: 不要混淆 That way、By the way、In that way 及 That is why。That way 帶出做法所產生的結果；By the way 用來轉換話題；In that way 描述做事的方法；That is why 先提出原因，再解釋結果。

sourceOmissions: The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.
The English wording in rule 5 expands the bilingual glossary labels into complete explanatory sentences without changing their meaning.

en: Rewrite each sentence or pair of sentences using That way to introduce the result or benefit of the action.
Write two sentences in every answer.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 That way 改寫以下句子或句子組合，以帶出前述行動或做法所產生的結果或好處。
每個答案均須寫成兩句。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: You should study this part first because the rest will then get easier.
questions.promptZh: 你應該先讀這一部分，因為這樣一來，其餘內容便會變得較容易。
questions.answer: You should study this part first. That way, the rest will get easier.
questions.answerZh: 你應該先讀這一部分。那樣的話，其餘內容便會變得較容易。
questions.highlight: You should study this part first. That way, the rest will get easier.

questions.prompt: Put your keys by the door so that you can find them quickly tomorrow.
questions.promptZh: 把鑰匙放在門旁邊，這樣你明天便可以很快找到它們。
questions.answer: Put your keys by the door. That way, you can find them quickly tomorrow.
questions.answerZh: 把鑰匙放在門旁邊。那樣的話，你明天便可以很快找到它們。
questions.highlight: Put your keys by the door. That way, you can find them quickly tomorrow.

questions.prompt: Mia writes new words in a notebook so that she can remember them more easily.
questions.promptZh: 米婭把新單字寫在筆記簿上，以便更容易記住它們。
questions.answer: Mia writes new words in a notebook. That way, she can remember them more easily.
questions.answerZh: 米婭把新單字寫在筆記簿上。那樣的話，她便可以更容易記住它們。
questions.highlight: Mia writes new words in a notebook. That way, she can remember them more easily.

questions.prompt: We should leave home now because we can catch the early bus if we do.
questions.promptZh: 我們應該現在離開家，因為這樣便可以趕上早班巴士。
questions.answer: We should leave home now. That way, we can catch the early bus.
questions.answerZh: 我們應該現在離開家。那樣的話，我們便可以趕上早班巴士。
questions.highlight: We should leave home now. That way, we can catch the early bus.

questions.prompt: Close the window so that the rain cannot get in.
questions.promptZh: 關上窗戶，以免雨水進入屋內。
questions.answer: Close the window. That way, the rain cannot get in.
questions.answerZh: 關上窗戶。那樣的話，雨水便無法進入屋內。
questions.highlight: Close the window. That way, the rain cannot get in.

questions.prompt: Ben charges his phone every night. This means it is ready to use in the morning.
questions.promptZh: 本每晚都為手機充電。這表示手機早上便可以使用。
questions.answer: Ben charges his phone every night. That way, it is ready to use in the morning.
questions.answerZh: 本每晚都為手機充電。那樣的話，手機早上便可以使用。
questions.highlight: Ben charges his phone every night. That way, it is ready to use in the morning.

questions.prompt: You should read the question twice because this can help you avoid careless mistakes.
questions.promptZh: 你應該把題目讀兩次，因為這樣可以幫助你避免粗心大意的錯誤。
questions.answer: You should read the question twice. That way, you can avoid careless mistakes.
questions.answerZh: 你應該把題目讀兩次。那樣的話，你便可以避免粗心大意的錯誤。
questions.highlight: You should read the question twice. That way, you can avoid careless mistakes.

questions.prompt: Sarah keeps a bottle of water on her desk because seeing it reminds her to drink regularly.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉在書桌上放一瓶水，因為水瓶可以提醒她定時喝水。
questions.answer: Sarah keeps a bottle of water on her desk. That way, she remembers to drink regularly.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉在書桌上放一瓶水。那樣的話，她便會記得定時喝水。
questions.highlight: Sarah keeps a bottle of water on her desk. That way, she remembers to drink regularly.

questions.prompt: Use a larger font so that everyone can read the slide.
questions.promptZh: 使用較大的字體，讓每個人都能看清楚簡報畫面。
questions.answer: Use a larger font. That way, everyone can read the slide.
questions.answerZh: 使用較大的字體。那樣的話，每個人都能看清楚簡報畫面。

questions.prompt: The children lined up quietly. This allowed the teacher to count them easily.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們安靜地排隊。這讓老師可以輕鬆點算人數。
questions.answer: The children lined up quietly. That way, the teacher could count them easily.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們安靜地排隊。那樣的話，老師便可以輕鬆點算人數。
questions.highlight: The children lined up quietly. That way, the teacher could count them easily.

questions.prompt: Jack is going to pack his bag tonight so that he will not need to rush tomorrow morning.

questions.prompt: Lily saved the file in two places so that she could recover it if one copy was lost.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉把檔案儲存在兩個地方，以便其中一份遺失時仍可取回檔案。
questions.answer: Lily saved the file in two places. That way, she could recover it if one copy was lost.
questions.answerZh: 莉莉把檔案儲存在兩個地方。那樣的話，即使其中一份遺失，她仍可取回檔案。
questions.highlight: Lily saved the file in two places. That way, she could recover it if one copy was lost.

questions.prompt: Omar controls his spending more easily by setting a weekly budget.
questions.promptZh: 奧馬爾透過設定每星期預算，更容易控制開支。

questions.prompt: Take a photograph of the parking level, and you will remember where the car is.

questions.highlight: Take a photograph of the parking level. That way, you will remember where the car is.

questions.promptZh: 廚師為每個容器貼上標籤，因為這樣可以更容易找到食材。

questions.answer: Leo checks the weather forecast. That way, he knows whether to carry an umbrella.

questions.promptZh: 艾瑪為甚麼保留收據？這些收據有助她核對每月開支。
questions.answer: Emma keeps her receipts. That way, she can check her monthly spending.

questions.answer: The nurse wrote the instructions in large letters. That way, the patient could read them easily.

questions.prompt: A reminder was added to the calendar. This prevented the team from forgetting the deadline.

questions.answer: Keep some cash with you. That way, you can still pay if a smaller shop does not accept cards.

questions.answer: The mechanic tested the brakes twice. That way, he reduced the risk of a safety problem.

questions.highlight: The mechanic tested the brakes twice. That way, he reduced the risk of a safety problem.

questions.prompt: By preparing several examples, the presenters could answer unexpected questions more confidently.
questions.promptZh: 講者準備了幾個例子，因此能更有信心地回答意料之外的問題。
questions.answer: The presenters prepared several examples. That way, they could answer unexpected questions more confidently.

questions.promptZh: 小徑沿途設置了燈光，讓人們可以在入夜後安全步行。
questions.answer: The lights were placed along the path. That way, people could walk safely after dark.

questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲把密碼清單儲存在安全的應用程式內。這讓她可以避免在所有地方使用相同密碼。

questions.prompt: If your hands are wet, dry them before touching the screen so that it will respond properly.

questions.prompt: By dividing the report into sections, we made it easier for readers to follow.

questions.prompt: Why did Chloe store the medicine on a high shelf? She did not want the children to be able to reach it.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊為甚麼把藥物放在高層架上？她不希望孩子能夠拿到藥物。
questions.answer: Chloe stored the medicine on a high shelf. That way, the children would not be able to reach it.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊把藥物放在高層架上。那樣的話，孩子便無法拿到藥物。
questions.highlight: Chloe stored the medicine on a high shelf. That way, the children would not be able to reach it.

questions.prompt: The receptionist asked guests to write their names clearly so that staff could prepare the correct visitor passes.

questions.answerZh: 接待員請訪客清楚寫下姓名。那樣的話，職員便可以準備正確的訪客證。
questions.highlight: The receptionist asked guests to write their names clearly. That way, staff could prepare the correct visitor passes.

questions.prompt: If a document contains private information, use a password to stop other people from opening it.
questions.promptZh: 如果文件載有私人資料，請使用密碼，防止其他人開啟文件。
questions.answer: Use a password if a document contains private information. That way, other people cannot open it.
questions.answerZh: 如果文件載有私人資料，請使用密碼。那樣的話，其他人便無法開啟文件。
questions.highlight: Use a password if a document contains private information. That way, other people cannot open it.

questions.prompt: The coach replayed the final minute of the match. This helped the players see where their defence had failed.
questions.promptZh: 教練重播了比賽最後一分鐘。這幫助球員看出防守在哪裏出現問題。
questions.answer: The coach replayed the final minute of the match. That way, the players could see where their defence had failed.
questions.answerZh: 教練重播了比賽最後一分鐘。那樣的話，球員便可以看出防守在哪裏出現問題。
questions.highlight: The coach replayed the final minute of the match. That way, the players could see where their defence had failed.

questions.prompt: By testing the microphone before the event, event organisers discovered the sound problem early.
questions.promptZh: 活動籌辦人員在活動前測試麥克風，因此提早發現音響問題。
questions.answer: Event organisers tested the microphone before the event. That way, they discovered the sound problem early.
questions.answerZh: 活動籌辦人員在活動前測試麥克風。那樣的話，他們便提早發現音響問題。
questions.highlight: Event organisers tested the microphone before the event. That way, they discovered the sound problem early.

questions.prompt: The bins are marked with different colours so that residents know where to put paper, glass and plastic.
questions.promptZh: 回收箱以不同顏色標示，讓居民知道紙張、玻璃和塑膠應放在哪裏。
questions.answer: The bins are marked with different colours. That way, residents know where to put paper, glass and plastic.
questions.answerZh: 回收箱以不同顏色標示。那樣的話，居民便知道紙張、玻璃和塑膠應放在哪裏。
questions.highlight: The bins are marked with different colours. That way, residents know where to put paper, glass and plastic.

questions.prompt: The manager gave each person one clear task. Therefore, nobody was confused about their responsibility.
questions.promptZh: 經理為每個人分配一項清晰的任務。因此，沒有人對自己的責任感到困惑。
questions.answer: The manager gave each person one clear task. That way, nobody was confused about their responsibility.
questions.answerZh: 經理為每個人分配一項清晰的任務。那樣的話，沒有人對自己的責任感到困惑。
questions.highlight: The manager gave each person one clear task. That way, nobody was confused about their responsibility.

questions.prompt: Parents receive one short weekly update from the school instead of several separate messages, so they can find important information more easily.
questions.promptZh: 家長每星期只收到學校發出的一份簡短更新，而不是數則分開的訊息，因此可以更容易找到重要資料。
questions.answer: Parents receive one short weekly update from the school instead of several separate messages. That way, they can find important information more easily.
questions.answerZh: 家長每星期只收到學校發出的一份簡短更新，而不是數則分開的訊息。那樣的話，他們便可以更容易找到重要資料。
questions.highlight: Parents receive one short weekly update from the school instead of several separate messages. That way, they can find important information more easily.

questions.prompt: The hospital keeps an interpreter list at the reception desk so that staff can quickly contact someone who speaks the patient’s language.
questions.promptZh: 醫院在接待處備有傳譯員名單，讓職員可以迅速聯絡懂得病人語言的人。
questions.answer: The hospital keeps an interpreter list at the reception desk. That way, staff can quickly contact someone who speaks the patient’s language.
questions.answerZh: 醫院在接待處備有傳譯員名單。那樣的話，職員便可以迅速聯絡懂得病人語言的人。
questions.highlight: The hospital keeps an interpreter list at the reception desk. That way, staff can quickly contact someone who speaks the patient’s language.

questions.prompt: By backing up the customer records automatically every night, the company can restore recent information after a computer failure.
questions.promptZh: 公司每晚自動備份顧客紀錄，因此在電腦故障後可以還原近期資料。
questions.answer: Every night, the company backs up the customer records automatically. That way, it can restore recent information after a computer failure.
questions.answerZh: 公司每晚自動備份顧客紀錄。那樣的話，電腦故障後便可以還原近期資料。
questions.highlight: Every night, the company backs up the customer records automatically. That way, it can restore recent information after a computer failure.

questions.prompt: The tour guide gave everyone a card showing the meeting point. This meant that anyone who became separated could find the group again.
questions.promptZh: 導遊給每個人一張印有集合地點的卡片。這表示任何與旅行團走散的人都可以重新找到旅行團。
questions.answer: The tour guide gave everyone a card showing the meeting point. That way, anyone who became separated could find the group again.
questions.answerZh: 導遊給每個人一張印有集合地點的卡片。那樣的話，任何與旅行團走散的人都可以重新找到旅行團。
questions.highlight: The tour guide gave everyone a card showing the meeting point. That way, anyone who became separated could find the group again.

questions.prompt: The team should agree on the decision-making process before the project begins because later disagreements may then be easier to settle.
questions.promptZh: 團隊應在項目開始前就決策程序達成共識，因為這樣日後的分歧可能會較容易解決。
questions.answer: The team should agree on the decision-making process before the project begins. That way, later disagreements may be easier to settle.
questions.answerZh: 團隊應在項目開始前就決策程序達成共識。那樣的話，日後的分歧可能會較容易解決。
questions.highlight: The team should agree on the decision-making process before the project begins. That way, later disagreements may be easier to settle.

questions.prompt: The community centre arranged activities at different times so that both daytime and evening workers could take part.
questions.promptZh: 社區中心把活動安排在不同時段，讓日間和晚間工作的市民都可以參加。
questions.answer: The community centre arranged activities at different times. That way, both daytime and evening workers could take part.
questions.answerZh: 社區中心把活動安排在不同時段。那樣的話，日間和晚間工作的市民都可以參加。
questions.highlight: The community centre arranged activities at different times. That way, both daytime and evening workers could take part.

questions.prompt: A simple checklist was attached to every order. As a result, warehouse staff were less likely to miss an item before shipment.
questions.promptZh: 每張訂單都附有一份簡單清單。因此，貨倉職員在出貨前較少機會遺漏貨品。
questions.answer: A simple checklist was attached to every order. That way, warehouse staff were less likely to miss an item before shipment.
questions.answerZh: 每張訂單都附有一份簡單清單。那樣的話，貨倉職員在出貨前便較少機會遺漏貨品。
questions.highlight: A simple checklist was attached to every order. That way, warehouse staff were less likely to miss an item before shipment.

questions.prompt: By asking customers to confirm their contact details before payment, the shop reduces the chance of delivery problems caused by incorrect information.
questions.promptZh: 商店請顧客在付款前確認聯絡資料，從而減少因資料錯誤而引起送貨問題的機會。
questions.answer: The shop asks customers to confirm their contact details before payment. That way, it reduces the chance of delivery problems caused by incorrect information.
questions.answerZh: 商店請顧客在付款前確認聯絡資料。那樣的話，商店便可以減少因資料錯誤而引起送貨問題的機會。
questions.highlight: The shop asks customers to confirm their contact details before payment. That way, it reduces the chance of delivery problems caused by incorrect information.

questions.prompt: The local authority published the road-closure plan several days early so that residents could choose another route before the event.
questions.promptZh: 當局提早數天公布封路安排，讓居民可以在活動前選擇其他路線。
questions.answer: The local authority published the road-closure plan several days early. That way, residents could choose another route before the event.
questions.answerZh: 當局提早數天公布封路安排。那樣的話，居民便可以在活動前選擇其他路線。
questions.highlight: The local authority published the road-closure plan several days early. That way, residents could choose another route before the event.

questions.prompt: The project leader summarised each decision at the end of the meeting. This gave absent colleagues a clear record and prevented the same issues from being discussed again.
questions.promptZh: 項目主管在會議結束時總結每項決定。這為缺席的同事提供清晰紀錄，並避免團隊再次討論相同問題。
questions.answer: The project leader summarised each decision at the end of the meeting. That way, absent colleagues had a clear record, and the same issues were not discussed again.
questions.answerZh: 項目主管在會議結束時總結每項決定。那樣的話，缺席的同事便有清晰紀錄，而相同問題亦沒有再次討論。
questions.highlight: The project leader summarised each decision at the end of the meeting. That way, absent colleagues had a clear record, and the same issues were not discussed again.
